### 5. MAYA AGENT: LIVE TRANSFER ASK PLUS PROMPT LEAKAGE GUARD TOKENS
Two open items on the insurance voice agent, both still flagging from Tuesday. First, add the live transfer ask into Maya's Sales node so she offers to bridge to a licensed advisor when intent score crosses threshold (per-node Model SOP keeps this on Claude Haiku, not Sonnet). Claude IQ 4.5 stays production, but the fallback paths have to be safe before any HTML email campaign to the 450 leads fires. This also unblocks item 9.

### 6. SHIP OUTBOUND RETRY AND NURTURE OR RESCHEDULE AS ONE N8N PROJECT
Still on the plate from Monday, both workflows share the same retry trigger plumbing. Outbound retry: failed calls from the 75% initial connect rate loop back through n8n into the same Retell agent with exponential backoff (15 min, 45 min, 2 hr). Nurture or reschedule: when a prospect says "call me at X time," write a timestamped row to Supabase and trigger a delayed re-call via n8n Wait node. Ship both today in a single commit to `orayacorporation.app.n8n.cloud`, tag them SLA-critical in the workflow names, and demo-capture a 45 second video for the SLA PDF attachment. Third week open.
